mapper.insert: INSERT INTO metadata( dataset_key, type, created, created_by, modified, modified_by, content, content_json ) VALUES( #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER}, 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type, now(), #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, convert_to(#{dp.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'UTF8'), CAST(#{dp.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb) );
mapper.update: UPDATE metadata SET modified = now(), modified_by = #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = convert_to(#{dp.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'UTF8'), content_json = CAST(#{dp.metadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb) WHERE dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type;
mapper.select: WITH latest AS ( SELECT m.content_json AS metadata, m.modified FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND m.type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type ORDER BY m.modified DESC, m.key DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT latest.metadata::text AS metadata, latest.modified, ( SELECT e.key FROM endpoint e WHERE e.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND e.type = 'DWC_DP' ORDER BY e.modified DESC NULLS LAST, e.key DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS endpoint_key FROM latest
SELECT m.content_json -> 'resources' FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND m.type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type ORDER BY m.modified DESC, m.key DESC LIMIT 1

WITH latest AS ( SELECT m.content_json AS metadata FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND m.type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type ORDER BY m.modified DESC, m.key DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT res AS resource FROM latest, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(metadata->'resources') res WHERE res->>'name' = #{resourceName} LIMIT 1

WITH latest AS ( SELECT m.content_json AS metadata FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = #{datasetKey,jdbcType=OTHER} AND m.type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type ORDER BY m.modified DESC, m.key DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT jsonb_agg(res->>'${resourceNameFieldName}') FROM latest, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(metadata->'resources') res

WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (m.dataset_key) m.dataset_key, m.content_json AS metadata, m.modified FROM metadata m WHERE m.type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type ORDER BY m.dataset_key, m.modified DESC, m.key DESC ) SELECT latest.dataset_key, ( SELECT e.key FROM endpoint e WHERE e.dataset_key = latest.dataset_key AND e.type = 'DWC_DP' ORDER BY e.modified DESC NULLS LAST, e.key DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS endpoint_key, latest.modified, jsonb_build_object( 'name', latest.metadata->>'name', 'title', latest.metadata->>'title', 'resources', ( SELECT jsonb_agg(res->>'name') FROM jsonb_array_elements(latest.metadata->'resources') res ) )::text AS metadata FROM latest
LIMIT #{params.limit} OFFSET #{params.offset}
SELECT count(DISTINCT dataset_key) FROM metadata WHERE type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type
